goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 12:30' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'tuesday'.
Make sure you get 'price' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'boat'.
Make sure you get 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 12:30 and should depart from london liverpool street
The train should go to cambridge and should leave on tuesday
Make sure you get price and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of boat
